dropZones.diagnosis: Visual change slows down here, so the screen feels less active than the stronger moments in the video. It can feel visually static.
dropZones.quickFix: Add a zoom, caption hit, cutaway, or motion graphic at this point.
dropZones.mediumFix: Reshoot this part with stronger B-roll or more deliberate visual motion.
dropZones.strategicFix: Design a visual change every 3 to 4 seconds so the viewer keeps getting new cues.

dropZones.diagnosis: Voice energy softens here, so the moment feels less urgent than the stronger parts of the video. The delivery loses momentum.
dropZones.quickFix: Trim pauses and tighten the pacing of this clip.
dropZones.mediumFix: Re-record this section with sharper emphasis and more deliberate energy.
dropZones.strategicFix: Plan vocal energy peaks every few seconds so the delivery stays dynamic.

overallVerdict: A few attention dips were detected. Tightening the weaker moments should noticeably improve retention.
